name: Suite 8 — Diverse Schema Coverage (Users / Roles / Comments / Categories / Sources / Histories)
description: Fresh questions intentionally NOT focused on Tickets only — exercises AspNetUsers, AspNetRoles, AspNetUserRoles, TicketComments, TicketCategories, TicketSources, TicketHistories, TicketAttachments, Entitys. Uses varied phrasing ("give me…", "who…", "how many…", "which…") to avoid identical paraphrasing of existing suites. Also validates the recalibrated OOS scope-confidence gate with truly off-domain questions.

Scenarios.Question: give me the list of all active users
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT UserName, Email FROM AspNetUsers WHERE IsActive = 1

Scenarios.Question: how many users do we have in total
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM AspNetUsers

Scenarios.Question: show me all roles in the system
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT Name FROM AspNetRoles ORDER BY Name

Scenarios.Question: who has the admin role
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT u.UserName, u.Email FROM AspNetUsers u JOIN AspNetUserRoles ur ON ur.UserId = u.Id JOIN AspNetRoles r ON r.Id = ur.RoleId WHERE r.Name = 'Admin'

Scenarios.Question: how many roles exist
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM AspNetRoles

Scenarios.Question: how many comments do we have in total
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM TicketComments WHERE IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: comment count per ticket
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, COUNT(c.Id) AS CommentCount FROM Tickets t LEFT JOIN TicketComments c ON c.TicketId = t.Id AND c.IsDeleted = 0 WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY t.TicketNumber ORDER BY CommentCount DESC

Scenarios.Question: tickets that have no comments
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TicketComments c WHERE c.TicketId = t.Id AND c.IsDeleted = 0)

Scenarios.Question: list all ticket categories
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT Name FROM TicketCategories ORDER BY Name

Scenarios.Question: tickets grouped by category
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT c.Name AS Category, COUNT(t.Id) AS Count FROM TicketCategories c LEFT JOIN Tickets t ON t.CategoryId = c.Id AND t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY c.Name ORDER BY Count DESC

Scenarios.Question: categories with no tickets at all
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT c.Name FROM TicketCategories c WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Tickets t WHERE t.CategoryId = c.Id AND t.IsDeleted = 0)

Scenarios.Question: which sources are tickets coming from
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT s.Name AS Source, COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketSources s ON s.Id = t.SourceId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY s.Name ORDER BY Count DESC

Scenarios.Question: list all active entities
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT Name FROM Entitys WHERE IsActive = 1 ORDER BY Name

Scenarios.Question: top 5 entities by ticket volume
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TOP 5 e.Name, COUNT(t.Id) AS TicketCount FROM Entitys e LEFT JOIN Tickets t ON t.EntityId = e.Id AND t.IsDeleted = 0 WHERE e.IsActive = 1 GROUP BY e.Name ORDER BY TicketCount DESC

Scenarios.Question: ticket histories from the last 7 days
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT h.TicketId, h.ChangedAt, h.FieldName FROM TicketHistories h WHERE h.ChangedAt >= DATEADD(DAY,-7,GETDATE())

Scenarios.Question: how many ticket attachments exist
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM TicketAttachments

Scenarios.Question: active users who created at least one ticket
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT DISTINCT u.UserName FROM AspNetUsers u JOIN Tickets t ON t.CreatedByUserId = u.Id WHERE u.IsActive = 1 AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: top 10 users who commented most
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TOP 10 u.UserName, COUNT(c.Id) AS CommentCount FROM AspNetUsers u JOIN TicketComments c ON c.UserId = u.Id WHERE c.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY u.UserName ORDER BY CommentCount DESC

Scenarios.Question: what is the best recipe for sourdough bread
Scenarios._note: OOS — recipes are not in the schema scope. Validates recalibrated B1 floors (0.40 / 0.70).

Scenarios.Question: what's the current price of Apple stock
Scenarios._note: OOS — financial markets data not in the schema scope. Validates recalibrated B1 floors.
